creator: mizhka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175986
SVN patch file

Hi,

Update Eclipse CDT to 9.0.1 & take maintainership. 
Portlint: looks fine :)
It works for me. 

There is one issue: it doesn't contain FreeBSD native libs. The impact is small (few features doesn't work), but in general CDT is awesome. I'm working on FreeBSD native libs, I hope it will be ready for next CDT update (CDT9.1 is available, but it requires Eclipse Neon.1, not yet in ports tree). 

Many thanks!
